sendParams: {"messaging_product": "whatsapp","to": "{{ batch.target.address }}","type": "template","template": {"name": "{{# batch.messages }}{{ text.name }}{{/ batch.messages }}","language": {"code": "en_US"}{{# batch.target.values }},"components": [{"type": "body","parameters": [{{# batch.target.values }}{"type": "text","text": "{{ value }}"}{{^ -last }},{{/ -last }}{{/ batch.target.values }}]}]{{/ batch.target.values }}}}

{"personalizations": [{"to": [{"email": "{{ target.address }}"}]}],"from": {"email": "{{> from }}", "name": "{{> name }}"},"subject":"{{ subject }}","content": [{{# messages }}{"type": "{{ text.type }}","value": "{{ text.body }}"}{{/ messages }}]{{# messages }}{{# files }},"attachments": [{"type": "{{ fileMime }}","content": "{{ fileData }}","filename": "{{ fileName }}"}{{^ -last }},{{/ -last }}]{{/ files }}{{/ messages }}}
